title: Breaking: Pernod Ricard and US firm Brown-Forman (owner of Jack Daniel's whisky) announce
summary: Pernod Ricard and US firm Brown-Forman (owner of Jack Daniel's whisky) announce failure of merger discussions — major Franco-American spirits deal collapses.
